description_for_human: The open-source operating system for AI agent fleets. Monitor, orchestrate, and persist knowledge across autonomous AI agents.
description_for_model: Stoic AgentOS is a production-grade AI agent operations platform. It provides LLM call tracing, three-tier memory (working/episodic/semantic), compliance audit trails with circuit breakers, auto-instrumentation for OpenAI and Anthropic, Claude-powered AI diagnostics, and multi-org RBAC with BYOK. SDKs available for Node.js (stoic-agentos-sdk) and Python (stoicos).
